name: MindReply - User Activity Tracking Pipeline
description: Comprehensive user activity tracking - pageviews, clicks, features used, session tracking, retention

parameters.query: INSERT INTO user_sessions (user_id, session_token, started_at) VALUES ('={{$json.user_id}}', '={{$json.session_token}}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (session_token) DO UPDATE SET last_activity = NOW() RETURNING id, duration_minutes

INSERT INTO user_activity (user_id, activity_type, page, feature, action, metadata, timestamp) VALUES ('={{$json.user_id}}', '={{$json.activity_type}}', '={{$json.page}}', '={{$json.feature}}', '={{$json.action}}', '={{JSON.stringify($json.metadata)}}', NOW())

UPDATE user_stats SET pageviews = pageviews + {{$json.pageviews}}, clicks = clicks + {{$json.clicks}}, features_used = features_used + {{$json.features_used}}, total_session_time = total_session_time + {{$json.time_on_page}}, last_active = NOW() WHERE user_id = '={{$json.user_id}}'

SELECT user_id, days_since_signup, last_active, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_activity WHERE user_id = u.user_id AND DATE(timestamp) = CURRENT_DATE) as today_activities FROM users u WHERE u.user_id = '={{$json.user_id}}'
